title: Un Style Eh Power Lyrics Sakalakala Vallavan Appatakkar Song Lyrics

Song: Un Style Eh Power
Singer(s): Sharmila & Deepak
Music: Thaman S
Movie: Sakalakala Vallavan Appatakkar

Un style Eh power
Naa public Figure
Unna chatting dating Panna poren da

Sadhikaari Sadhikaari en mela
thadumaari Vizhundhaye
Manasil Ezhundhaye
Hey Kadaak dhadaakunu thondai adaikudhu
Vedi chedikunu aasai Vedikudhu raasa

Hey Madak madakunu mutham kudikure
Dhiduk dhidukuna aagudhu lesa

Oru cycle pola enna otture

Hey kaadu medu pallam ellam enna kootu suthuriye

kaadhal krathagiye

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Un Style Eh Power celebrates confidence and charisma, portraying a fun and lively atmosphere.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Sakalakala Vallavan Appatakkar, the song showcases a vibrant party scene where characters express their playful side.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Deepak and Sharmila, with music composed by Thaman S.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Un Style Eh Power, the lively beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and celebration. The song reflects the carefree spirit of youth, encouraging listeners to embrace their unique style and confidence. It serves as a perfect backdrop for party scenes in Sakalakala Vallavan Appatakkar, evoking feelings of happiness and excitement. With its upbeat tempo, this track is sure to get everyone on their feet.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Un Style Eh Power is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and fun. With the unique collaboration of Deepak and Sharmila, this song brings a lively vibe that is hard to resist. The catchy beats by Thaman S make it a must-listen for any party playlist, ensuring you’ll be dancing along in no time!
stanzaMeanings: Your style is power, I am a public figure, I will chat and date you.
I am a performer, I have fallen for you, my mind is awake. Hey, my heart is racing, I desire to reach out. I want to kiss you, my dear, give me a kiss.
Hey, I am drinking kisses, it feels like a celebration.
Like a cycle, I am moving forward, that paradise is visible in your eyes.
Hey, the forest and the hills are all around me. Love is a place where I can say it, and love is a journey.
I am a performer, I have fallen for you, my mind is awake. Hey, my heart is racing, I desire to reach out. I want to kiss you, my dear, give me a kiss.

Love has come, so don't sleep too much. Now we are dancing to two foreign songs. We haven't taken our flight yet, we need to get our visa. There are no rules for this love. I haven't heard anything else but your words. I haven't just seen you, I haven't looked at anyone else. My heart is racing like money that has been spent. All my desires are coming together, love is a journey.
I am a performer, I have fallen for you, my mind is awake. Hey, my heart is racing, I desire to reach out. I want to kiss you, my dear, give me a kiss.
